ham.subject: Your Weekly Marketing Update – Exciting Offers Inside!
ham.body:
Hi Team,

We hope you had a great week! As part of our ongoing marketing initiatives, we are excited to share the latest updates, upcoming events, and exclusive offers available this week.

1. **New Product Launch – Avishkar 2024**: Get ready for the launch of our flagship product that combines cutting‑edge technology with user‑friendly design. Grab a 10% early‑bird discount by clicking here: <URL>

2. **Upcoming Webinar – “Digital Trends 2024”**: Join us on 5th June for a live session with industry experts. Register now: <URL>

3. **Special Offer for Subscribers**: For the next 48 hours, enjoy a 15% discount on all our premium services. Don’t miss this chance – use code WEEKLY15 at checkout: <URL>

4. **Customer Success Story**: Learn how our client, TechNova, increased revenue by 25% after implementing our solutions. Read the full case study: <URL>

Thank you for your continued support. Stay tuned for more updates next week!

Best regards,

Rohan Mehta
Marketing Lead
Innovate Solutions

P.S. Follow us on LinkedIn for daily insights: <URL>

spam.subject: URGENT: Payroll Update Required – Immediate Action Needed
spam.body:
Hello [Employee Name],

I hope you are doing well. This is Amit Gupta, the HR Manager of XYZ Pvt Ltd. I am contacting you regarding an urgent payroll update that needs to be completed by 31st May 2024.

Recently we discovered a discrepancy in your bank account details which has caused a delay in your salary disbursement. To avoid any further delay, please login to the payroll portal and verify your banking information within 48 hours. Failure to do so may result in a temporary suspension of your salary.

**Steps to update your details**:
1. Click the link below and enter your employee ID: <URL>
2. Confirm your bank name, IFSC code, and account number.
3. Submit the updated details.

You have to complete this process by 31st May 2024. If you have any questions, contact me at hr@xyz.com or call 0123-456-7890.

Thank you for your immediate attention.

Best regards,

Amit Gupta
HR Manager
XYZ Pvt Ltd

P.S. Kripya dhyan dein – this is a time‑sensitive matter.
